data/maps/PetalburgCity_House1/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House1_Text_TravelingIsWon: Traveling is wonderful!\pWhen I was young, I roamed the seas\nand the mountains!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_House1/text.inc.PetalburgCity_House1_Text_GoOnAdventure:
Sigh...\pI wish I could go on an adventure
with some POKéMON...\pCrawl through some damp grass...
Climb rocky, rugged mountains...\pCross the raging seas...
Wander about in dark caves...\pAnd, sometimes, even get a little
homesick...\pIt must be fabulous to travel!
